creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Maintainer timeout 44 days.
It have only one consumer - my port games/lwjgl3.
So I'll commit update this weekend unless the maintainer clearly says that he is against it.

There are a lot of bug fixes in this release - I also want to do merge-quarterly: https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin/releases/tag/v2.0.0
